name: T3 Defense Inc.
business: T3 Defense Inc. has transformed from a financial technology provider into a strategic acquirer and operator of aerospace and defense businesses, building a portfolio of mission-critical suppliers and advanced technology companies. It also serves as an exclusive U.S. distributor of drone payload systems and defense software, targeting government and homeland security customers.

exposures.sentence: We are building a portfolio of mission-critical suppliers and advanced technology companies and strategic infrastructure opportunities across the defense, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing sectors across the United States, Israel and Europe.

On January 15, 2026, the Company consummated its acquisition (the Nimbus Acquisition ) of 100% of Nimbus Drones Technologies and Marketing Ltd., an Israeli private company ( Nimbus ) specializing in unmanned aerial systems and services
The distribution of defense-related products, including drone payloads and software for GPS-denied navigation, AI simulations, 3D mapping, and multi-sensor management
The distribution of defense-related products, including drone payloads and software for GPS-denied navigation, AI simulations, 3D mapping, and multi-sensor management
Our Israeli-manufactured products, including generators, drone payloads, motion control systems, and AI software

China's demonstrated willingness to weaponize its dominance in rare earth minerals, critical semiconductor components, and drone components as instruments of geopolitical coercion threatens supply chains throughout the defense industry, including our own.

We are building a portfolio of mission-critical suppliers and advanced technology companies and strategic infrastructure opportunities across the defense, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing sectors across the United States, Israel and Europe.

catalysts.event: File preliminary proxy statement for special meeting
catalysts.sentence: The Company is required to file a preliminary proxy statement for a special meeting of the Company's stockholders within 75 days of the initial closing of the Private Placement.

catalysts.event: File initial registration statement with SEC
catalysts.sentence: The Company is required to prepare and file an initial registration statement with the Securities and Exchange Commission within 45 days of the date of the Securities Purchase Agreement (the Filing Deadline).
to use commercially reasonable efforts to have the Initial Registration Statement declared effective within 75 days of the date of the Securities Purchase Agreement (the Effectiveness Deadline).
the final payment which is due on June 29, 2026.

catalysts.event: Release of Escrowed Shares to Tiltan Seller
catalysts.sentence: On June 29, 2026, the escrow agent shall release to the Tiltan Seller shares of Common Stock having an aggregate value equal to 25% of the purchase price.

tamClaims.claim: The United States proposed a trillion-dollar defense budget for fiscal year 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: the United States proposing its first-ever trillion-dollar defense budget for fiscal year 2026.
